originContent: # MDE-troubleshooter
translatedContent: # MDE-troubleshooter

originContent: # INFO
translatedContent: # 信息

originContent: This tool is designed to assist you in analyzing issues related to Defender for Endpoint on your local endpoint. It offers a centralized view of the security configuration, log files, updates, and provides access to the Performance Analyzer.
translatedContent: 此工具旨在帮助您分析本地端点上与端点防护相关的问题。它提供安全配置、日志文件、更新的集中视图，并可访问性能分析器。

originContent: Please note that this is the initial version of the tool. If you encounter any bugs or have suggestions for enhancements, I encourage you to submit them on my GitHub page. Your feedback and reports are greatly appreciated.
translatedContent: 请注意，这是工具的初始版本。如果您遇到任何错误或有改进建议，欢迎在我的GitHub页面提交。非常感谢您的反馈和报告。

originContent: # Prerequisites
translatedContent: # 先决条件

originContent: Script need to run as admin to view all settings.
translatedContent: 脚本需以管理员身份运行以查看所有设置。

originContent: # Disclaimer
translatedContent: # 免责声明

originContent: Script provided as is. Use at own risk. No guarantees or warranty provided.
translatedContent: 脚本按原样提供。风险自负。不提供任何保证或担保。

originContent: # Contact
translatedContent: # 联系方式

originContent: linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/thomasvrhydn/
translatedContent: linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/thomasvrhydn/

originContent: twitter:  @thomasvrhydn
translatedContent: twitter:  @thomasvrhydn

originContent: # Features
translatedContent: # 功能

originContent: Defender AV
translatedContent: Defender AV

originContent: Version Information — AM Engine, AM Product, AM Service, NIS Engine versions, AM Running Mode, Computer State
translatedContent: 版本信息 — AM引擎、AM产品、AM服务、NIS引擎版本，AM运行模式，计算机状态

originContent: Service Status — AM Service, Antivirus, Antispyware, NIS enabled states, Virtual Machine detection, Computer ID
translatedContent: 服务状态 — AM服务、杀毒、反间谍软件、NIS启用状态、虚拟机检测、计算机ID

originContent: Real-Time Protection — RealTime Protection, OnAccess Protection, Behavior Monitor, IOAV Protection, Tamper Protection status and source
translatedContent: 实时保护 — 实时保护、访问时保护、行为监控、IOAV保护、防篡改状态及来源

originContent: Scan Information — Full and Quick scan age, start/end times
translatedContent: 扫描信息 — 全面和快速扫描时间间隔，开始/结束时间

originContent: Protection Settings — Cloud Block Level, Block at First Seen, Cloud Timeout, Quarantine purge days, File Hash Computation, Device Control state
translatedContent: 保护设置 — 云阻止级别、首次发现阻止、云超时、隔离清理天数、文件哈希计算、设备控制状态

originContent: Additional Information — Signature Fallback Order, NIS Signature last updated, Last Quick Scan source
translatedContent: 附加信息 — 签名回退顺序、NIS签名最后更新时间、上次快速扫描来源

originContent: Attack Surface Reduction
translatedContent: 攻击面缩减

originContent: ASR Rules Status — View all 19 ASR rules with their current state (Enabled / Audit / Warning / Not Enabled), with filtering by status in a sortable DataGrid popup
translatedContent: ASR规则状态 — 查看所有19条ASR规则及其当前状态（启用/审核/警告/未启用），支持状态过滤和可排序DataGrid弹出窗口

originContent: ASR Per-Rule Exclusions — View per-rule and global ASR exclusions read from the registry (HKLM:\...\Windows Defender Exploit Guard\ASR), with filtering by rule name
translatedContent: ASR单规则排除 — 查看注册表中读取的按规则及全局ASR排除项（HKLM:\...\Windows Defender Exploit Guard\ASR），支持规则名称过滤

originContent: Exploit Protection — Export and open the Exploit Protection XML configuration
translatedContent: 利用防护 — 导出并打开利用防护XML配置

originContent: Exclusions
translatedContent: 排除项

originContent: Defender AV Exclusions — View all configured exclusions (Path, Extension, Process, IP Address) with search and type filtering in a popup DataGrid
translatedContent: Defender AV排除项 — 查看所有配置的排除项（路径、扩展名、进程、IP地址），在弹出DataGrid中支持搜索和类型过滤

originContent: Registry Key Information — Shows ManagedDefenderProductType, EnrollmentStatus, HideExclusionsFromLocalAdmins, DisableLocalAdminMerge, and determines management status with tamper protection validation (Intune-only, ConfigMgr, Co-managed scenarios)
translatedContent: 注册表项信息 — 显示 ManagedDefenderProductType、EnrollmentStatus、HideExclusionsFromLocalAdmins、DisableLocalAdminMerge，并通过篡改保护验证确定管理状态（仅限 Intune、ConfigMgr、联合管理场景）

originContent: Updates
translatedContent: 更新

originContent: Current Signature Information — AV Signature version/age/last updated, Antispyware Signature version/age, NIS Signature version
translatedContent: 当前签名信息 — AV 签名版本/年龄/最后更新，反间谍软件签名版本/年龄，NIS 签名版本

originContent: Latest Microsoft Versions — Fetches the latest Engine, Platform, and Signature versions from Microsoft's website for comparison
translatedContent: 最新微软版本 — 从微软网站获取最新引擎、平台和签名版本以供比较

originContent: Update Actions — Trigger a signature update via MpCmdRun.exe directly from the UI
translatedContent: 更新操作 — 通过 UI 直接触发 MpCmdRun.exe 进行签名更新

originContent: Logs
translatedContent: 日志

originContent: SENSE Logs — View EDR sensor event logs (Microsoft-Windows-SENSE/Operational) with filtering by text and level (Information/Warning/Error), plus a detail pane for selected entries
translatedContent: SENSE 日志 — 查看 EDR 传感器事件日志（Microsoft-Windows-SENSE/Operational），支持按文本和级别（信息/警告/错误）过滤，及选中条目的详细面板

originContent: Defender AV Logs — View antivirus event logs (Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational) with the same filtering and detail capabilities
translatedContent: Defender AV 日志 — 查看杀毒事件日志（Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational），具备相同的过滤和详细功能

originContent: Performance
translatedContent: 性能

originContent: Performance Recording — Start a Defender AV performance recording session (New-MpPerformanceRecording) that captures scan activity to an ETL file
translatedContent: 性能录制 — 启动 Defender AV 性能录制会话（New-MpPerformanceRecording），将扫描活动捕获到 ETL 文件

originContent: Performance Reports — Generate reports from ETL recordings with selectable report types: Overview, Top 10 Files, Top 10 Extensions, Top 10 Processes, Top 10 Scans (multiple reports open simultaneously in separate windows)
translatedContent: 性能报告 — 从 ETL 录制生成报告，支持选择报告类型：概览、十大文件、十大扩展名、十大进程、十大扫描（多个报告可同时在独立窗口打开）

originContent: Estimated Impact (MPlog) — Parse the latest MPlog file for EstimatedImpact entries, sorted by impact value, to identify high-impact scan targets
translatedContent: 估计影响（MPlog） — 解析最新 MPlog 文件中的 EstimatedImpact 条目，按影响值排序，以识别高影响扫描目标

originContent: Client Analyzer Download — Download the official Microsoft Defender Client Analyzer tool (MDEClientAnalyzer.zip) to a folder of your choice
translatedContent: 客户端分析器下载 — 下载官方 Microsoft Defender 客户端分析器工具（MDEClientAnalyzer.zip）到指定文件夹

originContent: Proxy
translatedContent: 代理

originContent: Proxy Configuration — Displays the current Proxy URL and Proxy PAC configured for Defender
translatedContent: 代理配置 — 显示 Defender 当前配置的代理 URL 和代理 PAC

originContent: Firewall
translatedContent: 防火墙

originContent: Profile Status — View Domain, Private, and Public firewall profile settings (Enabled, Default Inbound/Outbound Action, Log Allowed)
translatedContent: 配置文件状态 — 查看域、专用和公共防火墙配置文件设置（启用状态、默认入站/出站动作、允许日志）

originContent: Firewall Rules Browser — View all Windows Firewall rules in a filterable DataGrid with search, direction, action, enabled state, and profile filters. Shows rule name, ports, protocol, and program path
translatedContent: 防火墙规则浏览器 — 在可筛选的数据网格中查看所有 Windows 防火墙规则，支持搜索、方向、动作、启用状态和配置文件过滤。显示规则名称、端口、协议和程序路径
